title: alectryon affinis
intro: Alectryon affinis, also known as the Java cockspur or Java cockspur tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alectryon affinis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
